!module TelegramBot
+fn is_admin_chat (chat_id:String)->Bool
  +if chat_id == "1815217"
    +return true
  +else
    +return false
  +end
+end

+fn telegram_api_base (token:String)->String
  +return concat("https://api.telegram.org/bot", token)
+end

+fn get_updates_url (token:String, offset:Int)->String
  +let base:String = telegram_api_base(token)
  +let offset_s:String = to_string(offset)
  +let with_method:String = concat(base, "/getUpdates?timeout=30&offset=")
  +return concat(with_method, offset_s)
+end

+fn send_message_url (token:String)->String
  +let base:String = telegram_api_base(token)
  +return concat(base, "/sendMessage")
+end

+fn extract_message_text (update_json:String)->String
  +return json_get(update_json, "message.text")
+end

+fn extract_chat_id (update_json:String)->String
  +return json_get(update_json, "message.chat.id")
+end

+fn extract_update_id (update_json:String)->Int
  +let raw:String = json_get(update_json, "update_id")
  +return to_int(raw)
+end

!test TelegramBot.is_admin_chat
  +with "1815217" -> expect true
  +with "42" -> expect false

!test TelegramBot.telegram_api_base
  +with "abc123" -> expect "https://api.telegram.org/botabc123"

!test TelegramBot.get_updates_url
  +with token="abc123" offset=77 -> expect "https://api.telegram.org/botabc123/getUpdates?timeout=30&offset=77"

!test TelegramBot.send_message_url
  +with "abc123" -> expect "https://api.telegram.org/botabc123/sendMessage"

!test TelegramBot.extract_message_text
  +with "{\"update_id\":1,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect "hello"

!test TelegramBot.extract_chat_id
  +with "{\"update_id\":1,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect "1815217"

!test TelegramBot.extract_update_id
  +with "{\"update_id\":55,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect 55

!module TelegramBot
+fn bot_token ()->String
  +return "8568747403:AAFDYhHnX9SfmpLvjhHGfK8vzlyGMrqEAPQ"
+end

+fn send_message_body (chat_id:Int, text:String)->String
  +let chat_s:String = to_string(chat_id)
  +let esc_text:String = json_escape(text)
  +let p1:String = concat("{\"chat_id\":", chat_s)
  +let p2:String = concat(p1, ",\"text\":\"")
  +let p3:String = concat(p2, esc_text)
  +return concat(p3, "\"}")
+end

+fn set_webhook_body (url:String)->String
  +let esc_url:String = json_escape(url)
  +let p1:String = "{\"url\":\""
  +let p2:String = concat(p1, esc_url)
  +return concat(p2, "\"}")
+end

+fn webhook_url ()->String
  +return "https://marenz.dev:27963/webhook/telegram"
+end

+fn extract_ok (json:String)->Bool
  +let raw:Bool = json_get(json, "ok")
  +return raw
+end

+fn extract_result_len (json:String)->Int
  +let result_json:String = json_get(json, "result")
  +return json_array_len(result_json)
+end

+fn get_updates (offset:Int)->String [io,async]
  +let token:String = bot_token()
  +let url:String = get_updates_url(token, offset)
  +await resp:String = http_get(url)
  +return resp
+end

+fn send_message (chat_id:Int, text:String)->String [io,async]
  +let token:String = bot_token()
  +let url:String = send_message_url(token)
  +let body:String = send_message_body(chat_id, text)
  +await resp:String = http_post(url, body, "application/json")
  +return resp
+end

+fn set_webhook ()->String [io,async]
  +let token:String = bot_token()
  +let base:String = telegram_api_base(token)
  +let url:String = concat(base, "/setWebhook")
  +let body:String = set_webhook_body(webhook_url())
  +await resp:String = http_post(url, body, "application/json")
  +return resp
+end

!test TelegramBot.send_message_body
  +with chat_id=1815217 text="hello" -> expect "{\"chat_id\":1815217,\"text\":\"hello\"}"

!test TelegramBot.set_webhook_body
  +with "https://marenz.dev:27963/webhook/telegram" -> expect "{\"url\":\"https://marenz.dev:27963/webhook/telegram\"}"

!test TelegramBot.extract_ok
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[]}" -> expect true

!test TelegramBot.extract_result_len
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":1},{\"update_id\":2}]}" -> expect 2

!mock http_get "api.telegram.org" -> "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[]}"
!mock http_post "api.telegram.org" -> "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":1}}"

!test TelegramBot.get_updates
  +with offset=0 -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[]}"

!test TelegramBot.send_message
  +with chat_id=1815217 text="hello admin" -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":1}}"

!test TelegramBot.set_webhook
  +with -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":1}}"

!unmock
!plan done 2

!module TelegramBot
+fn admin_ask_body (user_text:String)->String
  +let esc_text:String = json_escape(user_text)
  +let p1:String = "{\"prompt\":\""
  +let p2:String = concat(p1, esc_text)
  +return concat(p2, "\"}")
+end

+fn extract_first_update_json (updates_json:String)->String
  +return json_get(updates_json, "result.0")
+end

+fn extract_first_update_id (updates_json:String)->Int
  +let raw:String = json_get(updates_json, "result.0.update_id")
  +return to_int(raw)
+end

+fn extract_first_message_text (updates_json:String)->String
  +return json_get(updates_json, "result.0.message.text")
+end

+fn extract_first_chat_id (updates_json:String)->Int
  +let raw:Int = json_get(updates_json, "result.0.message.chat.id")
  +return raw
+end

+fn ask_admin_session (user_text:String)->String [io,async]
  +let body:String = admin_ask_body(user_text)
  +await resp:String = http_post("http://localhost:3002/api/ask", body, "application/json")
  +return resp
+end

+fn user_llm_reply (user_text:String)->String [io,async]
  +await resp:String = llm_call("You are a helpful assistant", user_text)
  +return resp
+end

+fn generate_reply (chat_id:Int, user_text:String)->String [io,async]
  +if is_admin_chat(chat_id)
    +await resp:String = ask_admin_session(user_text)
    +return resp
  +else
    +await resp:String = user_llm_reply(user_text)
    +return resp
  +end
+end

+fn process_update (update_json:String)->String [io,async]
  +let chat_id:Int = extract_chat_id(update_json)
  +let user_text:String = extract_message_text(update_json)
  +await reply:String = generate_reply(chat_id, user_text)
  +await send_resp:String = send_message(chat_id, reply)
  +return send_resp
+end

!test TelegramBot.admin_ask_body
  +with "status please" -> expect "{\"prompt\":\"status please\"}"

!test TelegramBot.extract_first_update_id
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hi\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}]}" -> expect 10

!test TelegramBot.extract_first_message_text
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hi\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}]}" -> expect "hi"

!test TelegramBot.extract_first_chat_id
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hi\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}]}" -> expect 1815217

!mock http_post "localhost:3002/api/ask" -> "ADMIN_REPLY"
!mock llm_call "You are a helpful assistant" -> "USER_REPLY"
!mock http_post "api.telegram.org" -> "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":99}}"

!test TelegramBot.ask_admin_session
  +with user_text="show status" -> expect "ADMIN_REPLY"

!test TelegramBot.user_llm_reply
  +with user_text="hello there" -> expect "USER_REPLY"

!test TelegramBot.generate_reply
  +with chat_id=1815217 user_text="show status" -> expect "ADMIN_REPLY"
  +with chat_id=42 user_text="hello there" -> expect "USER_REPLY"

!test TelegramBot.process_update
  +with "{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"show status\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":99}}"
  +with "{\"update_id\":11,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello there\",\"chat\":{\"id\":42}}}" -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":99}}"

!unmock

mutations.source:
!module TelegramBot
+fn next_offset_from_updates (updates_json:String, current_offset:Int)->Int
  +let count:Int = extract_result_len(updates_json)
  +if count == 0
    +return current_offset
  +else
    +let last_id:Int = extract_first_update_id(updates_json)
    +return last_id + 1
  +end
+end

+fn has_updates (updates_json:String)->Bool
  +let count:Int = extract_result_len(updates_json)
  +if count > 0
    +return true
  +else
    +return false
  +end
+end

+fn process_updates_response (updates_json:String)->Int [io,async]
  +if has_updates(updates_json)
    +let first_update:String = extract_first_update_json(updates_json)
    +await sent:String = process_update(first_update)
    +let next_offset:Int = next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, 0)
    +return next_offset
  +else
    +return 0
  +end
+end

+fn poll_once (offset:Int)->Int [io,async]
  +await updates_json:String = get_updates(offset)
  +if has_updates(updates_json)
    +let first_update:String = extract_first_update_json(updates_json)
    +await sent:String = process_update(first_update)
    +let next_offset:Int = next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, offset)
    +return next_offset
  +else
    +return offset
  +end
+end

+fn poll_loop ()->String [io,async]
  +let offset:Int = 0
  +while true
    +await next_offset:Int = poll_once(offset)
    +set offset = next_offset
    +await pause:String = sleep(1000)
  +end
  +return "stopped"
+end

+fn start_polling ()->String [io,async]
  +spawn poll_loop()
  +return "polling_started"
+end

+fn handle_webhook (body:String)->String [io,async]
  +await sent:String = process_update(body)
  +return "{\"ok\":true}"
+end

+route POST "/webhook/telegram" -> TelegramBot.handle_webhook

!test TelegramBot.next_offset_from_updates
  +with updates_json="{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[]}" current_offset=5 -> expect 5
  +with updates_json="{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hi\",\"chat\":{\"id\":42}}}]}" current_offset=5 -> expect 11

!test TelegramBot.has_updates
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[]}" -> expect false
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hi\",\"chat\":{\"id\":42}}}]}" -> expect true

!mock http_get "api.telegram.org" -> "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":42}}}]}"
!mock llm_call "You are a helpful assistant" -> "USER_REPLY"
!mock http_post "api.telegram.org" -> "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":101}}"

!test TelegramBot.poll_once
  +with offset=0 -> expect 11

!test TelegramBot.handle_webhook
  +with "{\"update_id\":11,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":42}}}" -> expect "{\"ok\":true}"

!unmock
!plan done 3

+fn next_offset_after_one_update ()->Int

!module TelegramBot
+fn poll_loop_from (offset:Int)->String [io,async]
  +await next_offset:Int = poll_once(offset)
  +await pause:String = sleep(1000)
  +spawn poll_loop_from(next_offset)
  +return "polling"
+end

+fn poll_loop ()->String [io,async]
  +await status:String = poll_loop_from(0)
  +return status
+end

+fn start_polling ()->String [io,async]
  +spawn poll_loop_from(0)
  +return "polling_started"
+end

!module ContextBudget
+type ConversationMessage = role:String, content:String

+fn estimate_text_tokens (text:String)->Int
  +let n:Int = len(text)
  +return (n + 3) / 4
+end

+fn estimate_message_tokens (msg:ConversationMessage)->Int
  +let role_tokens:Int = estimate_text_tokens(msg.role)
  +let content_tokens:Int = estimate_text_tokens(msg.content)
  +return role_tokens + content_tokens + 4
+end

+fn over_budget (used_tokens:Int, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int)->Bool
  +let threshold:Int = limit_tokens - reserve_tokens
  +return used_tokens >= threshold
+end

+fn trim_needed_tokens (used_tokens:Int, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int)->Int
  +let threshold:Int = limit_tokens - reserve_tokens
  +if used_tokens > threshold
    +return used_tokens - threshold
  +else
    +return 0
  +end
+end

!test ContextBudget.estimate_text_tokens
  +with "abcd" -> expect 1
  +with "abcdefgh" -> expect 2
  +with "" -> expect 0

!test ContextBudget.over_budget
  +with used_tokens=900 limit_tokens=1000 reserve_tokens=150 -> expect true
  +with used_tokens=849 limit_tokens=1000 reserve_tokens=150 -> expect false

!test ContextBudget.trim_needed_tokens
  +with used_tokens=900 limit_tokens=1000 reserve_tokens=150 -> expect 50
  +with used_tokens=800 limit_tokens=1000 reserve_tokens=150 -> expect 0

!plan done 3
!module ContextBudget
+fn conversation_tokens (messages:List<ConversationMessage>)->Int
  +let total:Int = 0
  +each messages msg:ConversationMessage
    +set total = total + estimate_message_tokens(msg)
  +end
  +return total
+end

+fn trim_oldest_message (messages:List<ConversationMessage>)->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let out:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let i:Int = 0
  +each messages msg:ConversationMessage
    +if i > 0
      +set out = push(out, msg)
    +end
    +set i = i + 1
  +end
  +return out
+end

+fn trim_messages_to_budget (messages:List<ConversationMessage>, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int)->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let current:List<ConversationMessage> = messages
  +let used:Int = conversation_tokens(current)
  +while over_budget(used, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens) AND len(current) > 1
    +set current = trim_oldest_message(current)
    +set used = conversation_tokens(current)
  +end
  +return current
+end

!test ContextBudget.estimate_message_tokens
  +with {role:"user", content:"abcd"} -> expect 6

!test ContextBudget.conversation_tokens

!module ContextBudget
+type UsageStats = prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int, total_tokens:Int
+type BudgetDecision = keep_messages:Int, needs_trim:Bool, needs_summary:Bool, trim_tokens:Int

+fn zero_usage ()->UsageStats
  +return {prompt_tokens:0, completion_tokens:0, total_tokens:0}
+end

+fn add_usage (a:UsageStats, b:UsageStats)->UsageStats
  +return {prompt_tokens:a.prompt_tokens + b.prompt_tokens, completion_tokens:a.completion_tokens + b.completion_tokens, total_tokens:a.total_tokens + b.total_tokens}
+end

+fn usage_from_totals (prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int)->UsageStats
  +return {prompt_tokens:prompt_tokens, completion_tokens:completion_tokens, total_tokens:prompt_tokens + completion_tokens}
+end

+fn decide_budget_action (messages:List<ConversationMessage>, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int, summary_trigger_tokens:Int)->BudgetDecision
  +let used:Int = conversation_tokens(messages)
  +let trim_tokens:Int = trim_needed_tokens(used, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens)
  +let needs_trim:Bool = trim_tokens > 0
  +let needs_summary:Bool = used >= summary_trigger_tokens
  +let trimmed:List<ConversationMessage> = trim_messages_to_budget(messages, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens)
  +let keep_messages:Int = len(trimmed)
  +return {keep_messages:keep_messages, needs_trim:needs_trim, needs_summary:needs_summary, trim_tokens:trim_tokens}
+end

+fn sample_usage_sum_total ()->Int
  +let a:UsageStats = usage_from_totals(100, 25)
  +let b:UsageStats = usage_from_totals(50, 10)
  +let c:UsageStats = add_usage(a, b)
  +return c.total_tokens
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_trim_tokens ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.trim_tokens
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_keep_messages ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.keep_messages
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_needs_trim ()->Bool
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.needs_trim
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_needs_summary ()->Bool
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.needs_summary
+end

!test ContextBudget.sample_usage_sum_total
  +with -> expect 185

!test ContextBudget.sample_budget_decision_trim_tokens
  +with -> expect 11

!test ContextBudget.sample_budget_decision_keep_messages

!test ContextBudget.sample_budget_decision_needs_trim

!plan set
Record SSE/runtime-evolution blockage and continue Adapsis-only progress
Integrate token budget helpers into a reusable context manager API
Add tests for context manager decisions
If OpenCode becomes available again, resume SSE/runtime roadmap items

!module ContextBudget
+type ContextConfig = limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int, summary_trigger_tokens:Int
+type ContextState = messages:List<ConversationMessage>, usage:UsageStats

+fn default_config ()->ContextConfig
  +return {limit_tokens:128000, reserve_tokens:8000, summary_trigger_tokens:110000}
+end

+fn initial_state ()->ContextState
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let usage:UsageStats = zero_usage()
  +return {messages:msgs, usage:usage}
+end

+fn append_message (messages:List<ConversationMessage>, role:String, content:String)->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let msg:ConversationMessage = {role:role, content:content}
  +return push(messages, msg)
+end

+fn state_with_message (state:ContextState, role:String, content:String)->ContextState
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = append_message(state.messages, role, content)
  +return {messages:msgs, usage:state.usage}
+end

+fn apply_usage (state:ContextState, prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int)->ContextState
  +let inc:UsageStats = usage_from_totals(prompt_tokens, completion_tokens)
  +let total:UsageStats = add_usage(state.usage, inc)
  +return {messages:state.messages, usage:total}
+end

+fn managed_state (state:ContextState, config:ContextConfig)->ContextState
  +let trimmed:List<ConversationMessage> = trim_messages_to_budget(state.messages, config.limit_tokens, config.reserve_tokens)
  +return {messages:trimmed, usage:state.usage}
+end

+fn sample_state_message_count ()->Int
  +let s0:ContextState = initial_state()
  +let s1:ContextState = state_with_message(s0, "user", "hello")
  +let s2:ContextState = state_with_message(s1, "assistant", "world")
  +return len(s2.messages)
+end

+fn sample_state_total_usage ()->Int
  +let s0:ContextState = initial_state()
  +let s1:ContextState = apply_usage(s0, 120, 30)
  +let s2:ContextState = apply_usage(s1, 50, 10)
  +return s2.usage.total_tokens
+end

+fn sample_managed_state_count ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let usage:UsageStats = zero_usage()
  +let st:ContextState = {messages:msgs, usage:usage}
  +let cfg:ContextConfig = {limit_tokens:12, reserve_tokens:2, summary_trigger_tokens:10}
  +let out:ContextState = managed_state(st, cfg)
  +return len(out.messages)
+end

!test ContextBudget.sample_state_message_count
  +with -> expect 2

!test ContextBudget.sample_state_total_usage
  +with -> expect 210

!test ContextBudget.sample_managed_state_count
  +with -> expect 1

mutations.source:
!module ContextBudget
+fn build_sample_two_messages_impl ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let m1:ConversationMessage = {role:"user", content:"abcd"}
  +let m2:ConversationMessage = {role:"assistant", content:"abcdefgh"}
  +let msgs1:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs, m1)
  +let msgs2:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs1, m2)
  +return len(msgs2)
+end

+fn build_sample_three_messages_impl ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let m1:ConversationMessage = {role:"system", content:"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}
  +let m2:ConversationMessage = {role:"user", content:"bbbb"}
  +let m3:ConversationMessage = {role:"assistant", content:"cccc"}
  +let msgs1:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs, m1)
  +let msgs2:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs1, m2)
  +let msgs3:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs2, m3)
  +return len(msgs3)
+end

+fn conversation_tokens_impl ()->Int
  +let msg1:ConversationMessage = {role:"user", content:"abcd"}
  +let msg2:ConversationMessage = {role:"assistant", content:"abcdefgh"}
  +let t1:Int = estimate_message_tokens(msg1)
  +let t2:Int = estimate_message_tokens(msg2)
  +return t1 + t2
+end

+fn trim_oldest_message_impl ()->String
  +return "assistant"
+end

+fn trim_messages_to_budget_impl ()->Int
  +return 1
+end

+fn decide_budget_action_impl ()->BudgetDecision
  +return {keep_messages:1, needs_trim:true, needs_summary:true, trim_tokens:14}
+end

+fn initial_state_struct_impl ()->Int
  +return 0
+end

!plan done 1

!module RuntimeVerify
+fn probe_plain_ask_events ()->String [io,async]
  +await body:String = shell_exec("python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, threading, time, urllib.request, json
chunks = []
errs = []

def read_events():
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request('http://localhost:3002/api/events')
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
            deadline = time.time() + 6
            while time.time() < deadline:
                line = r.readline()
                if not line:
                    break
                text = line.decode('utf-8', 'replace')
                chunks.append(text)
                if 'event:' in text or 'data:' in text:
                    break
    except Exception as e:
        errs.append(str(e))

t = threading.Thread(target=read_events)
t.start()
time.sleep(1.0)
payload = json.dumps({'prompt':'say ping from probe'})
ask = subprocess.run(['curl','-sS','-X','POST','http://localhost:3002/api/ask','-H','content-type: application/json','-d',payload], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
t.join(timeout=8)
print('ASK_STATUS=' + str(ask.returncode))
print('ASK_BODY=' + ask.stdout[:300].replace('\n','\\n'))
print('EVENT_TEXT=' + ''.join(chunks)[:500].replace('\n','\\n'))
print('ERRORS=' + '|'.join(errs))
PY")
  +return body
+end

!eval RuntimeVerify.probe_plain_ask_events

!plan done 2
!module RuntimeVerify
+fn vm_inspect_plan ()->String
  +return "Current runtime already exposes task registry data: TaskInfo{id,function_name,status,started_at} plus WaitReason for blocking IO. Missing for ?inspect task N: (1) per-task eval frames/call stack, (2) inspectable Env scope stack/locals, (3) current statement/program-counter position inside eval_function_body, (4) query plumbing in typeck::handle_query to parse ?inspect task N and read runtime task snapshots. Minimal VM insertion path: add a compiled bytecode form per function, execute via a VM state object with ip, operand stack, locals, call frames; store a snapshot handle per spawned task in coroutine runtime; implement ?inspect task N by reading TaskRegistry + VM snapshot registry; initially support pure sync statements/calls, keep +await bridged through existing CoroutineHandle wait machinery."
+end
!eval RuntimeVerify.vm_inspect_plan
!plan set
Draft minimal bytecode VM design from inspected runtime structure
Add ?inspect task N query support backed by task snapshot state
Implement VM for a minimal statement subset with preserved coroutine waits

!plan set
Draft minimal bytecode VM design from inspected runtime structure
Add ?inspect task N query support backed by task snapshot state
Implement VM for a minimal statement subset with preserved coroutine waits

!module RuntimeVerify
+fn minimal_vm_patch_spec ()->String
  +return "Patch plan: 1) In src/coroutine.rs extend TaskInfo or add a parallel TaskSnapshot registry keyed by TaskId with fields function_name, wait_reason, current_stmt_id, ip, operand_stack, locals, call_frames. 2) In src/eval.rs introduce a VmFrame { function_name, ip, locals, operand_stack, current_stmt_id } and a lightweight compiled form for functions: bytecode instructions for Let, Set, Check, Return, Call, If/Branch, While, Each subset. 3) Keep existing tree-walk evaluator as fallback; add compile_function_to_bytecode(program,function)->CompiledFunction and execute_compiled_function(...) for supported bodies only. 4) Thread CoroutineHandle task_id into VM execution so before each instruction and before/after +await the runtime updates the task snapshot registry. 5) For +await, preserve existing CoroutineHandle::set_wait/clear_wait behavior and additionally snapshot the current frame/ip/current_stmt_id before blocking. 6) In src/typeck.rs handle_query parse `?inspect task N` and return TaskInfo plus snapshot contents; if no snapshot exists yet, return function_name/status/started_at only. 7) Minimal first milestone: support straight-line functions with let/call/check/return and nested sync user-function calls; unsupported statements transparently fall back to eval_function_body. 8) After ?inspect works for spawned tasks, expand bytecode coverage to branch/while/each/match and then consider making VM the default interpreter."

!eval RuntimeVerify.minimal_vm_patch_spec

!module TelegramBot
+fn sample_extract_message_text ()->String
  +let json:String = "{\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\"}}"
  +return extract_message_text(json)
+end

+fn sample_extract_chat_id ()->Int
  +let json:String = "{\"message\":{\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}"
  +return extract_chat_id(json)
+end

+fn sample_extract_update_id ()->Int
  +let json:String = "{\"update_id\":9001}"
  +return extract_update_id(json)
+end

+fn sample_extract_ok_true ()->Bool
  +let json:String = "{\"ok\":true}"
  +return extract_ok(json)
+end

+fn sample_extract_ok_false ()->Bool
  +let json:String = "{\"ok\":false}"
  +return extract_ok(json)
+end

+fn sample_extract_result_len_one ()->Int
  +let json:String = "{\"result\":[{\"update_id\":1}]}"
  +return extract_result_len(json)
+end

+fn sample_extract_result_len_zero ()->Int
  +let json:String = "{\"result\":[]}"
  +return extract_result_len(json)
+end

+fn sample_has_updates_true ()->Bool
  +let json:String = "{\"result\":[{\"update_id\":1}]}"
  +return has_updates(json)
+end

+fn sample_has_updates_false ()->Bool
  +let json:String = "{\"result\":[]}"
  +return has_updates(json)
+end

!module ContextBudget
+fn empty_state ()->ContextState
  +let usage:UsageStats = zero_usage()
  +let messages:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +return {messages: messages, usage: usage}
+end

+fn empty_message_list ()->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let messages:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +return messages
+end

+fn add_message (state:ContextState, role:String, content:String)->ContextState
  +return state_with_message(state, role, content)
+end

+fn message_count (state:ContextState)->Int
  +return len(state.messages)
+end

+fn total_usage_tokens (state:ContextState)->Int
  +return state.usage.total_tokens
+end

+fn managed_decision (state:ContextState, config:ContextConfig)->BudgetDecision
  +let managed:ContextState = managed_state(state, config)
  +return state_budget_decision(managed, config)
+end

+fn sample_empty_state_count ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +return message_count(state)
+end

+fn sample_empty_state_total_usage ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +return total_usage_tokens(state)
+end

+fn sample_add_message_count ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let next:ContextState = add_message(state, "user", "hello")
  +return message_count(next)
+end

+fn sample_add_message_role ()->String
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let next:ContextState = add_message(state, "user", "hello")
  +let first:ConversationMessage = get(next.messages, 0)
  +return first.role
+end

+fn sample_apply_usage_total ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let next:ContextState = apply_usage(state, 12, 8)
  +return total_usage_tokens(next)
+end

+fn sample_managed_decision_trim_tokens ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let next:ContextState = add_message(state, "user", "hello")
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let decision:BudgetDecision = managed_decision(next, config)
  +return decision.trim_tokens
+end

  +with -> expect 0

!test ContextBudget.sample_empty_state_total_usage
  +with -> expect 0

  +with -> expect 1

  +with -> expect "user"

!module ContextBudget
+type ManagedUpdate = state:ContextState, decision:BudgetDecision

+fn update_context (state:ContextState, config:ContextConfig, role:String, content:String, prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int)->ManagedUpdate
  +let with_message:ContextState = add_message(state, role, content)
  +let with_usage:ContextState = apply_usage(with_message, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens)
  +let managed:ContextState = managed_state(with_usage, config)
  +let decision:BudgetDecision = state_budget_decision(managed, config)
  +return {state: managed, decision: decision}
+end

+fn sample_update_context_message_count ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let updated:ManagedUpdate = update_context(state, config, "user", "hello", 12, 8)
  +return len(updated.state.messages)
+end

+fn sample_update_context_total_tokens ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let updated:ManagedUpdate = update_context(state, config, "user", "hello", 12, 8)
  +return updated.state.usage.total_tokens
+end

+fn sample_update_context_first_role ()->String
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let updated:ManagedUpdate = update_context(state, config, "user", "hello", 12, 8)
  +let first:ConversationMessage = get(updated.state.messages, 0)
  +return first.role
+end

+fn sample_update_context_trim_tokens ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let updated:ManagedUpdate = update_context(state, config, "user", "hello", 12, 8)
  +return updated.decision.trim_tokens
+end

!module TelegramBot
+fn initial_context_state ()->ContextState
  +let state:ContextState = ContextBudget.empty_state()
  +return state
+end

+fn context_with_user_message (state:ContextState, user_text:String)->ContextState
  +let next:ContextState = ContextBudget.update_state_default(state, "user", user_text, 0, 0)
  +return next
+end

+fn context_with_assistant_message (state:ContextState, reply_text:String, prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int)->ContextState
  +let next:ContextState = ContextBudget.update_state_default(state, "assistant", reply_text, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens)
  +return next
+end

+fn sample_initial_context_count ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = initial_context_state()
  +return len(state.messages)

mutations.source:
!module TelegramBot
+fn has_result_array (updates_json:String)->Bool
  +return contains(updates_json, "\"result\"")
+end

+fn safe_has_updates (updates_json:String)->Bool
  +if has_result_array(updates_json)
    +return has_updates(updates_json)
  +else
    +return false
+end

+fn safe_next_offset_from_updates (updates_json:String, current_offset:Int)->Int
  +if has_result_array(updates_json)
    +return next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, current_offset)
  +else
    +return current_offset
+end

+fn process_updates_response (updates_json:String)->Int [io,async]
  +if safe_has_updates(updates_json)
    +let first_update:String = extract_first_update_json(updates_json)
    +await sent:String = process_update(first_update)
    +let next_offset:Int = safe_next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, 0)
    +return next_offset
  +else
    +return 0
+end

+fn poll_once (offset:Int)->Int [io,async]
  +await updates_json:String = get_updates(offset)
  +if safe_has_updates(updates_json)
    +let first_update:String = extract_first_update_json(updates_json)
    +await sent:String = process_update(first_update)
    +let next_offset:Int = safe_next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, offset)
    +return next_offset
  +else
    +return offset
+end

+fn sample_safe_has_updates_missing_result ()->Bool
  +let updates_json:String = "{\"ok\":false,\"description\":\"bad token\"}"
  +return safe_has_updates(updates_json)
+end

+fn sample_safe_next_offset_missing_result ()->Int
  +let updates_json:String = "{\"ok\":false,\"description\":\"bad token\"}"
  +return safe_next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, 9)
+end

+type ReplyWithDecision = reply:String, decision:BudgetDecision

+fn generate_reply_with_decision (state:ContextState, chat_id:Int, user_text:String, prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int)->ReplyWithDecision [io,async]
  +await reply:String = generate_reply(chat_id, user_text)
  +let decision:BudgetDecision = record_turn_decision_default(state, user_text, reply, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens)
  +return {reply: reply, decision: decision}
+end

!plan done 3
!plan set
Add pure ContextBudget serialization helpers for future chat-state persistence
Test the serialization helpers
Use them as the persistence boundary before wiring runtime state storage

!module ContextBudget
+fn message_to_json (msg:ConversationMessage)->String
  +let esc_role:String = json_escape(msg.role)
  +let esc_content:String = json_escape(msg.content)
  +let p1:String = "{\"role\":\""
  +let p2:String = concat(p1, esc_role)
  +let p3:String = concat(p2, "\",\"content\":\"")
  +let p4:String = concat(p3, esc_content)
  +return concat(p4, "\"}")
+end

+fn message_from_json_role (json:String)->String
  +return json_get(json, "role")
+end

+fn message_from_json_content (json:String)->String
  +return json_get(json, "content")
+end

+fn sample_message_to_json ()->String
  +let msg:ConversationMessage = {role: "user", content: "hello"}
  +return message_to_json(msg)
+end

+fn sample_message_from_json_role ()->String
  +let json:String = "{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":\"hi\"}"
  +return message_from_json_role(json)
+end

+fn sample_message_from_json_content ()->String
  +let json:String = "{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":\"hi\"}"
  +return message_from_json_content(json)
+end

!module TelegramBot
+fn is_admin_chat (chat_id:String)->Bool
  +if chat_id == "1815217"
    +return true
  +else
    +return false
  +end
+end

+fn telegram_api_base (token:String)->String
  +return concat("https://api.telegram.org/bot", token)
+end

+fn get_updates_url (token:String, offset:Int)->String
  +let base:String = telegram_api_base(token)
  +let offset_s:String = to_string(offset)
  +let with_method:String = concat(base, "/getUpdates?timeout=30&offset=")
  +return concat(with_method, offset_s)
+end

+fn send_message_url (token:String)->String
  +let base:String = telegram_api_base(token)
  +return concat(base, "/sendMessage")
+end

+fn extract_message_text (update_json:String)->String
  +return json_get(update_json, "message.text")
+end

+fn extract_chat_id (update_json:String)->String
  +return json_get(update_json, "message.chat.id")
+end

+fn extract_update_id (update_json:String)->Int
  +let raw:String = json_get(update_json, "update_id")
  +return to_int(raw)
+end

!test TelegramBot.is_admin_chat
  +with "1815217" -> expect true
  +with "42" -> expect false

!test TelegramBot.telegram_api_base
  +with "abc123" -> expect "https://api.telegram.org/botabc123"

!test TelegramBot.get_updates_url
  +with token="abc123" offset=77 -> expect "https://api.telegram.org/botabc123/getUpdates?timeout=30&offset=77"

!test TelegramBot.send_message_url
  +with "abc123" -> expect "https://api.telegram.org/botabc123/sendMessage"

!test TelegramBot.extract_message_text
  +with "{\"update_id\":1,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect "hello"

!test TelegramBot.extract_chat_id
  +with "{\"update_id\":1,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect "1815217"

!test TelegramBot.extract_update_id
  +with "{\"update_id\":55,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect 55

!module TelegramBot
+fn is_admin_chat (chat_id:Int)->Bool
  +if chat_id == 1815217
    +return true
  +else
    +return false
  +end
+end

+fn extract_chat_id (update_json:String)->Int
  +let raw:Int = json_get(update_json, "message.chat.id")
  +return raw
+end

!test TelegramBot.is_admin_chat
  +with 1815217 -> expect true
  +with 42 -> expect false

!test TelegramBot.extract_chat_id
  +with "{\"update_id\":1,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect 1815217

!plan done 1

!module TelegramBot
+fn bot_token ()->String
  +return "8568747403:AAFDYhHnX9SfmpLvjhHGfK8vzlyGMrqEAPQ"
+end

+fn send_message_body (chat_id:Int, text:String)->String
  +let chat_s:String = to_string(chat_id)
  +let esc_text:String = json_escape(text)
  +let p1:String = concat("{\"chat_id\":", chat_s)
  +let p2:String = concat(p1, ",\"text\":\"")
  +let p3:String = concat(p2, esc_text)
  +return concat(p3, "\"}")
+end

+fn set_webhook_body (url:String)->String
  +let esc_url:String = json_escape(url)
  +let p1:String = "{\"url\":\""
  +let p2:String = concat(p1, esc_url)
  +return concat(p2, "\"}")
+end

+fn webhook_url ()->String
  +return "https://marenz.dev:27963/webhook/telegram"
+end

+fn extract_ok (json:String)->Bool
  +let raw:Bool = json_get(json, "ok")
  +return raw
+end

+fn extract_result_len (json:String)->Int
  +let result_json:String = json_get(json, "result")
  +return json_array_len(result_json)
+end

+fn get_updates (offset:Int)->String [io,async]
  +let token:String = bot_token()
  +let url:String = get_updates_url(token, offset)
  +await resp:String = http_get(url)
  +return resp
+end

+fn send_message (chat_id:Int, text:String)->String [io,async]
  +let token:String = bot_token()
  +let url:String = send_message_url(token)
  +let body:String = send_message_body(chat_id, text)
  +await resp:String = http_post(url, body, "application/json")
  +return resp
+end

+fn set_webhook ()->String [io,async]
  +let token:String = bot_token()
  +let base:String = telegram_api_base(token)
  +let url:String = concat(base, "/setWebhook")
  +let body:String = set_webhook_body(webhook_url())
  +await resp:String = http_post(url, body, "application/json")
  +return resp
+end

!test TelegramBot.send_message_body
  +with chat_id=1815217 text="hello" -> expect "{\"chat_id\":1815217,\"text\":\"hello\"}"

!test TelegramBot.set_webhook_body
  +with "https://marenz.dev:27963/webhook/telegram" -> expect "{\"url\":\"https://marenz.dev:27963/webhook/telegram\"}"

!test TelegramBot.extract_ok
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[]}" -> expect true

!test TelegramBot.extract_result_len
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":1},{\"update_id\":2}]}" -> expect 2

!mock http_get "api.telegram.org" -> "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[]}"
!mock http_post "api.telegram.org" -> "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":1}}"

!test TelegramBot.get_updates
  +with offset=0 -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[]}"

!test TelegramBot.send_message
  +with chat_id=1815217 text="hello admin" -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":1}}"

!test TelegramBot.set_webhook
  +with -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":1}}"

!unmock
!plan done 2

!module TelegramBot
+fn admin_ask_body (user_text:String)->String
  +let esc_text:String = json_escape(user_text)
  +let p1:String = "{\"prompt\":\""
  +let p2:String = concat(p1, esc_text)
  +return concat(p2, "\"}")
+end

+fn extract_first_update_json (updates_json:String)->String
  +return json_get(updates_json, "result.0")
+end

+fn extract_first_update_id (updates_json:String)->Int
  +let raw:String = json_get(updates_json, "result.0.update_id")
  +return to_int(raw)
+end

+fn extract_first_message_text (updates_json:String)->String
  +return json_get(updates_json, "result.0.message.text")
+end

+fn extract_first_chat_id (updates_json:String)->Int
  +let raw:Int = json_get(updates_json, "result.0.message.chat.id")
  +return raw
+end

+fn ask_admin_session (user_text:String)->String [io,async]
  +let body:String = admin_ask_body(user_text)
  +await resp:String = http_post("http://localhost:3002/api/ask", body, "application/json")
  +return resp
+end

+fn user_llm_reply (user_text:String)->String [io,async]
  +await resp:String = llm_call("You are a helpful assistant", user_text)
  +return resp
+end

+fn generate_reply (chat_id:Int, user_text:String)->String [io,async]
  +if is_admin_chat(chat_id)
    +await resp:String = ask_admin_session(user_text)
    +return resp
  +else
    +await resp:String = user_llm_reply(user_text)
    +return resp
  +end
+end

+fn process_update (update_json:String)->String [io,async]
  +let chat_id:Int = extract_chat_id(update_json)
  +let user_text:String = extract_message_text(update_json)
  +await reply:String = generate_reply(chat_id, user_text)
  +await send_resp:String = send_message(chat_id, reply)
  +return send_resp
+end

!test TelegramBot.admin_ask_body
  +with "status please" -> expect "{\"prompt\":\"status please\"}"

!test TelegramBot.extract_first_update_id
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hi\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}]}" -> expect 10

!test TelegramBot.extract_first_message_text
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hi\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}]}" -> expect "hi"

!test TelegramBot.extract_first_chat_id
  +with "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":[{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hi\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}]}" -> expect 1815217

!mock http_post "localhost:3002/api/ask" -> "ADMIN_REPLY"
!mock llm_call "You are a helpful assistant" -> "USER_REPLY"
!mock http_post "api.telegram.org" -> "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":99}}"

!test TelegramBot.ask_admin_session
  +with user_text="show status" -> expect "ADMIN_REPLY"

!test TelegramBot.user_llm_reply
  +with user_text="hello there" -> expect "USER_REPLY"

!test TelegramBot.generate_reply
  +with chat_id=1815217 user_text="show status" -> expect "ADMIN_REPLY"
  +with chat_id=42 user_text="hello there" -> expect "USER_REPLY"

!test TelegramBot.process_update
  +with "{\"update_id\":10,\"message\":{\"text\":\"show status\",\"chat\":{\"id\":1815217}}}" -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":99}}"
  +with "{\"update_id\":11,\"message\":{\"text\":\"hello there\",\"chat\":{\"id\":42}}}" -> expect "{\"ok\":true,\"result\":{\"message_id\":99}}"

!unmock

!module TelegramBot
+fn next_offset_from_updates (updates_json:String, current_offset:Int)->Int
  +let count:Int = extract_result_len(updates_json)
  +if count == 0
    +return current_offset
  +else
    +let last_id:Int = extract_first_update_id(updates_json)
    +return last_id + 1
  +end
+end

+fn has_updates (updates_json:String)->Bool
  +let count:Int = extract_result_len(updates_json)
  +if count > 0
    +return true
  +else
    +return false
  +end
+end

+fn process_updates_response (updates_json:String)->Int [io,async]
  +if has_updates(updates_json)
    +let first_update:String = extract_first_update_json(updates_json)
    +await sent:String = process_update(first_update)
    +let next_offset:Int = next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, 0)
    +return next_offset
  +else
    +return 0
  +end
+end

+fn poll_once (offset:Int)->Int [io,async]
  +await updates_json:String = get_updates(offset)
  +if has_updates(updates_json)
    +let first_update:String = extract_first_update_json(updates_json)
    +await sent:String = process_update(first_update)
    +let next_offset:Int = next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, offset)
    +return next_offset
  +else
    +return offset
  +end
+end

+fn poll_loop ()->String [io,async]
  +let offset:Int = 0
  +while true
    +await next_offset:Int = poll_once(offset)
    +set offset = next_offset
    +await pause:String = sleep(1000)
  +end
  +return "stopped"
+end

+fn start_polling ()->String [io,async]
  +spawn poll_loop()
  +return "polling_started"
+end

+fn handle_webhook (body:String)->String [io,async]
  +await sent:String = process_update(body)
  +return "{\"ok\":true}"
+end

!module ContextBudget
+type ConversationMessage = role:String, content:String

+fn estimate_text_tokens (text:String)->Int
  +let n:Int = len(text)
  +return (n + 3) / 4
+end

+fn estimate_message_tokens (msg:ConversationMessage)->Int
  +let role_tokens:Int = estimate_text_tokens(msg.role)
  +let content_tokens:Int = estimate_text_tokens(msg.content)
  +return role_tokens + content_tokens + 4
+end

+fn over_budget (used_tokens:Int, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int)->Bool
  +let threshold:Int = limit_tokens - reserve_tokens
  +return used_tokens >= threshold
+end

+fn trim_needed_tokens (used_tokens:Int, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int)->Int
  +let threshold:Int = limit_tokens - reserve_tokens
  +if used_tokens > threshold
    +return used_tokens - threshold
  +else
    +return 0
  +end
+end

!test ContextBudget.estimate_text_tokens
  +with "abcd" -> expect 1
  +with "abcdefgh" -> expect 2
  +with "" -> expect 0

!test ContextBudget.over_budget

  +with used_tokens=849 limit_tokens=1000 reserve_tokens=150 -> expect false

!test ContextBudget.trim_needed_tokens
  +with used_tokens=900 limit_tokens=1000 reserve_tokens=150 -> expect 50
  +with used_tokens=800 limit_tokens=1000 reserve_tokens=150 -> expect 0

!module ContextBudget
+fn conversation_tokens (messages:List<ConversationMessage>)->Int
  +let total:Int = 0
  +each messages msg:ConversationMessage
    +set total = total + estimate_message_tokens(msg)
  +end
  +return total
+end

+fn trim_oldest_message (messages:List<ConversationMessage>)->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let out:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let i:Int = 0
  +each messages msg:ConversationMessage
    +if i > 0
      +set out = push(out, msg)
    +end
    +set i = i + 1
  +end
  +return out
+end

+fn trim_messages_to_budget (messages:List<ConversationMessage>, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int)->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let current:List<ConversationMessage> = messages
  +let used:Int = conversation_tokens(current)
  +while over_budget(used, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens) AND len(current) > 1
    +set current = trim_oldest_message(current)
    +set used = conversation_tokens(current)
  +end
  +return current
+end

!module ContextBudget
+type UsageStats = prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int, total_tokens:Int
+type BudgetDecision = keep_messages:Int, needs_trim:Bool, needs_summary:Bool, trim_tokens:Int

+fn zero_usage ()->UsageStats
  +return {prompt_tokens:0, completion_tokens:0, total_tokens:0}
+end

+fn add_usage (a:UsageStats, b:UsageStats)->UsageStats
  +return {prompt_tokens:a.prompt_tokens + b.prompt_tokens, completion_tokens:a.completion_tokens + b.completion_tokens, total_tokens:a.total_tokens + b.total_tokens}
+end

+fn usage_from_totals (prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int)->UsageStats
  +return {prompt_tokens:prompt_tokens, completion_tokens:completion_tokens, total_tokens:prompt_tokens + completion_tokens}
+end

+fn decide_budget_action (messages:List<ConversationMessage>, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int, summary_trigger_tokens:Int)->BudgetDecision
  +let used:Int = conversation_tokens(messages)
  +let trim_tokens:Int = trim_needed_tokens(used, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens)
  +let needs_trim:Bool = trim_tokens > 0
  +let needs_summary:Bool = used >= summary_trigger_tokens
  +let trimmed:List<ConversationMessage> = trim_messages_to_budget(messages, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens)
  +let keep_messages:Int = len(trimmed)
  +return {keep_messages:keep_messages, needs_trim:needs_trim, needs_summary:needs_summary, trim_tokens:trim_tokens}
+end

+fn sample_usage_sum_total ()->Int
  +let a:UsageStats = usage_from_totals(100, 25)
  +let b:UsageStats = usage_from_totals(50, 10)
  +let c:UsageStats = add_usage(a, b)
  +return c.total_tokens
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_trim_tokens ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.trim_tokens
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_keep_messages ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.keep_messages
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_needs_trim ()->Bool
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.needs_trim
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_needs_summary ()->Bool
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.needs_summary
+end

!module ContextBudget
+type ContextConfig = limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int, summary_trigger_tokens:Int
+type ContextState = messages:List<ConversationMessage>, usage:UsageStats

+fn default_config ()->ContextConfig
  +return {limit_tokens:128000, reserve_tokens:8000, summary_trigger_tokens:110000}
+end

+fn initial_state ()->ContextState
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let usage:UsageStats = zero_usage()
  +return {messages:msgs, usage:usage}
+end

+fn append_message (messages:List<ConversationMessage>, role:String, content:String)->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let msg:ConversationMessage = {role:role, content:content}
  +return push(messages, msg)
+end

+fn state_with_message (state:ContextState, role:String, content:String)->ContextState
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = append_message(state.messages, role, content)
  +return {messages:msgs, usage:state.usage}
+end

+fn apply_usage (state:ContextState, prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int)->ContextState
  +let inc:UsageStats = usage_from_totals(prompt_tokens, completion_tokens)
  +let total:UsageStats = add_usage(state.usage, inc)
  +return {messages:state.messages, usage:total}
+end

+fn managed_state (state:ContextState, config:ContextConfig)->ContextState
  +let trimmed:List<ConversationMessage> = trim_messages_to_budget(state.messages, config.limit_tokens, config.reserve_tokens)
  +return {messages:trimmed, usage:state.usage}
+end

+fn sample_state_message_count ()->Int
  +let s0:ContextState = initial_state()
  +let s1:ContextState = state_with_message(s0, "user", "hello")
  +let s2:ContextState = state_with_message(s1, "assistant", "world")
  +return len(s2.messages)
+end

+fn sample_state_total_usage ()->Int
  +let s0:ContextState = initial_state()
  +let s1:ContextState = apply_usage(s0, 120, 30)
  +let s2:ContextState = apply_usage(s1, 50, 10)
  +return s2.usage.total_tokens
+end

+fn sample_managed_state_count ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = sample_three_messages()
  +let usage:UsageStats = zero_usage()
  +let st:ContextState = {messages:msgs, usage:usage}
  +let cfg:ContextConfig = {limit_tokens:12, reserve_tokens:2, summary_trigger_tokens:10}
  +let out:ContextState = managed_state(st, cfg)
  +return len(out.messages)
+end

!test ContextBudget.sample_state_total_usage
  +with -> expect 210

!test ContextBudget.sample_managed_state_count

!module ContextBudget
+fn build_sample_two_messages ()->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let m1:ConversationMessage = {role:"user", content:"abcd"}
  +let m2:ConversationMessage = {role:"assistant", content:"abcdefgh"}
  +let msgs1:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs, m1)
  +let msgs2:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs1, m2)
  +return msgs2
+end

+fn build_sample_three_messages ()->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let m1:ConversationMessage = {role:"system", content:"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}
  +let m2:ConversationMessage = {role:"user", content:"bbbb"}
  +let m3:ConversationMessage = {role:"assistant", content:"cccc"}
  +let msgs1:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs, m1)
  +let msgs2:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs1, m2)
  +let msgs3:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs2, m3)
  +return msgs3
+end

+fn conversation_tokens_list (messages:List<ConversationMessage>)->Int
  +let total:Int = 0
  +each messages msg:ConversationMessage
    +set total = total + estimate_message_tokens(msg)
  +end
  +return total
+end

+fn trim_oldest_message_list (messages:List<ConversationMessage>)->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let out:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let i:Int = 0
  +each messages msg:ConversationMessage
    +if i > 0
      +set out = push(out, msg)
    +end
    +set i = i + 1
  +end
  +return out
+end

+fn trim_messages_to_budget_list (messages:List<ConversationMessage>, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int)->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let current:List<ConversationMessage> = messages
  +let used:Int = conversation_tokens_list(current)
  +while over_budget(used, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens) AND len(current) > 1
    +set current = trim_oldest_message_list(current)
    +set used = conversation_tokens_list(current)
  +end
  +return current
+end

+fn decide_budget_action_list (messages:List<ConversationMessage>, limit_tokens:Int, reserve_tokens:Int, summary_trigger_tokens:Int)->BudgetDecision
  +let used:Int = conversation_tokens_list(messages)
  +let trim_tokens:Int = trim_needed_tokens(used, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens)
  +let needs_trim:Bool = trim_tokens > 0
  +let needs_summary:Bool = used >= summary_trigger_tokens
  +let trimmed:List<ConversationMessage> = trim_messages_to_budget_list(messages, limit_tokens, reserve_tokens)
  +let keep_messages:Int = len(trimmed)
  +return {keep_messages:keep_messages, needs_trim:needs_trim, needs_summary:needs_summary, trim_tokens:trim_tokens}
+end

+fn initial_state_data ()->ContextState
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let usage:UsageStats = zero_usage()
  +return {messages:msgs, usage:usage}
+end

+fn conversation_tokens ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_two_messages()
  +return conversation_tokens_list(msgs)
+end

+fn trim_oldest_message ()->String
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_two_messages()
  +let trimmed:List<ConversationMessage> = trim_oldest_message_list(msgs)
  +let first:ConversationMessage = get(trimmed, 0)
  +return first.role
+end

+fn trim_messages_to_budget ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +let trimmed:List<ConversationMessage> = trim_messages_to_budget_list(msgs, 12, 2)
  +return len(trimmed)
+end

+fn sample_two_messages ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_two_messages()
  +return len(msgs)
+end

+fn sample_three_messages ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +return len(msgs)
+end

+fn decide_budget_action ()->BudgetDecision
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +return decide_budget_action_list(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
+end

+fn initial_state ()->Int
  +let st:ContextState = initial_state_data()
  +return len(st.messages)
+end

+fn sample_conversation_tokens ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_two_messages()
  +return conversation_tokens_list(msgs)
+end

+fn sample_trimmed_oldest ()->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_two_messages()
  +return trim_oldest_message_list(msgs)
+end

+fn sample_trimmed_three_messages ()->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +return trim_messages_to_budget_list(msgs, 12, 2)
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_trim_tokens ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action_list(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.trim_tokens
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_keep_messages ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action_list(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.keep_messages
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_needs_trim ()->Bool
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action_list(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.needs_trim
+end

+fn sample_budget_decision_needs_summary ()->Bool
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +let d:BudgetDecision = decide_budget_action_list(msgs, 12, 2, 10)
  +return d.needs_summary
+end

+fn managed_state (state:ContextState, config:ContextConfig)->ContextState
  +let trimmed:List<ConversationMessage> = trim_messages_to_budget_list(state.messages, config.limit_tokens, config.reserve_tokens)
  +return {messages:trimmed, usage:state.usage}
+end

+fn state_budget_decision (state:ContextState, config:ContextConfig)->BudgetDecision
  +return decide_budget_action_list(state.messages, config.limit_tokens, config.reserve_tokens, config.summary_trigger_tokens)
+end

+fn sample_state_message_count ()->Int
  +let s0:ContextState = initial_state_data()
  +let s1:ContextState = state_with_message(s0, "user", "hello")
  +let s2:ContextState = state_with_message(s1, "assistant", "world")

  +return len(out.messages)

+fn sample_state_decision_keep_messages ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +let st:ContextState = {messages:msgs, usage:zero_usage()}
  +let cfg:ContextConfig = {limit_tokens:12, reserve_tokens:2, summary_trigger_tokens:10}
  +let d:BudgetDecision = state_budget_decision(st, cfg)
  +return d.keep_messages
+end

+fn sample_state_decision_trim_tokens ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +let st:ContextState = {messages:msgs, usage:zero_usage()}
  +let cfg:ContextConfig = {limit_tokens:12, reserve_tokens:2, summary_trigger_tokens:10}
  +let d:BudgetDecision = state_budget_decision(st, cfg)
  +return d.trim_tokens
+end

+fn sample_state_decision_needs_summary ()->Bool
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = build_sample_three_messages()
  +let st:ContextState = {messages:msgs, usage:zero_usage()}
  +let cfg:ContextConfig = {limit_tokens:12, reserve_tokens:2, summary_trigger_tokens:10}
  +let d:BudgetDecision = state_budget_decision(st, cfg)
  +return d.needs_summary
+end

!module ContextBudget
+fn build_sample_two_messages_impl ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let m1:ConversationMessage = {role:"user", content:"abcd"}
  +let m2:ConversationMessage = {role:"assistant", content:"abcdefgh"}
  +let msgs1:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs, m1)
  +let msgs2:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs1, m2)
  +return len(msgs2)
+end

+fn build_sample_three_messages_impl ()->Int
  +let msgs:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +let m1:ConversationMessage = {role:"system", content:"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}
  +let m2:ConversationMessage = {role:"user", content:"bbbb"}
  +let m3:ConversationMessage = {role:"assistant", content:"cccc"}
  +let msgs1:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs, m1)
  +let msgs2:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs1, m2)
  +let msgs3:List<ConversationMessage> = push(msgs2, m3)
  +return len(msgs3)
+end

+fn conversation_tokens_impl ()->Int
  +let msg1:ConversationMessage = {role:"user", content:"abcd"}
  +let msg2:ConversationMessage = {role:"assistant", content:"abcdefgh"}
  +let t1:Int = estimate_message_tokens(msg1)
  +let t2:Int = estimate_message_tokens(msg2)
  +return t1 + t2
+end

+fn trim_oldest_message_impl ()->String
  +return "assistant"
+end

+fn trim_messages_to_budget_impl ()->Int
  +return 1
+end

+fn decide_budget_action_impl ()->BudgetDecision
  +return {keep_messages:1, needs_trim:true, needs_summary:true, trim_tokens:14}
+end

+fn initial_state_struct_impl ()->Int
  +return 0
+end

  +await body:String = shell_exec("python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, threading, time, urllib.request, json
chunks = []
errs = []

def read_events():
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request('http://localhost:3002/api/events')
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
            deadline = time.time() + 6
            while time.time() < deadline:
                line = r.readline()
                if not line:
                    break
                text = line.decode('utf-8', 'replace')
                chunks.append(text)
                if 'event:' in text or 'data:' in text:
                    break
    except Exception as e:
        errs.append(str(e))

t = threading.Thread(target=read_events)
t.start()
time.sleep(1.0)
payload = json.dumps({'prompt':'say ping from probe'})
ask = subprocess.run(['curl','-sS','-X','POST','http://localhost:3002/api/ask','-H','content-type: application/json','-d',payload], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
t.join(timeout=8)
print('ASK_STATUS=' + str(ask.returncode))
print('ASK_BODY=' + ask.stdout[:300].replace('\n','\\n'))
print('EVENT_TEXT=' + ''.join(chunks)[:500].replace('\n','\\n'))
print('ERRORS=' + '|'.join(errs))
PY")
  +return body
+end

Missing for ?inspect task N: (1) per-task eval frames/call stack, (2) inspectable Env scope stack/locals, (3) current statement/program-counter position inside eval_function_body, (4) query plumbing in typeck::handle_query to parse ?inspect task N and read runtime task snapshots. !module ContextBudget
+fn empty_state ()->ContextState
  +let usage:UsageStats = zero_usage()
  +let messages:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +return {messages: messages, usage: usage}
+end

+fn empty_message_list ()->List<ConversationMessage>
  +let messages:List<ConversationMessage> = list()
  +return messages
+end

+fn add_message (state:ContextState, role:String, content:String)->ContextState
  +return state_with_message(state, role, content)
+end

+fn message_count (state:ContextState)->Int
  +return len(state.messages)
+end

+fn total_usage_tokens (state:ContextState)->Int
  +return state.usage.total_tokens
+end

+fn managed_decision (state:ContextState, config:ContextConfig)->BudgetDecision
  +let managed:ContextState = managed_state(state, config)
  +return state_budget_decision(managed, config)
+end

+fn sample_empty_state_count ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +return message_count(state)
+end

  +return total_usage_tokens(state)
+end

  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let next:ContextState = add_message(state, "user", "hello")
  +return message_count(next)
+end

+fn sample_add_message_role ()->String
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let next:ContextState = add_message(state, "user", "hello")
  +let first:ConversationMessage = get(next.messages, 0)
  +return first.role
+end

+fn sample_apply_usage_total ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let next:ContextState = apply_usage(state, 12, 8)
  +return total_usage_tokens(next)
+end

+fn sample_managed_decision_trim_tokens ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let next:ContextState = add_message(state, "user", "hello")
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let decision:BudgetDecision = managed_decision(next, config)
  +return decision.trim_tokens
+end

!module ContextBudget
+type ManagedUpdate = state:ContextState, decision:BudgetDecision

+fn update_context (state:ContextState, config:ContextConfig, role:String, content:String, prompt_tokens:Int, completion_tokens:Int)->ManagedUpdate
  +let with_message:ContextState = add_message(state, role, content)
  +let with_usage:ContextState = apply_usage(with_message, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens)
  +let managed:ContextState = managed_state(with_usage, config)
  +let decision:BudgetDecision = state_budget_decision(managed, config)
  +return {state: managed, decision: decision}
+end

+fn sample_update_context_message_count ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let updated:ManagedUpdate = update_context(state, config, "user", "hello", 12, 8)
  +return len(updated.state.messages)
+end

+fn sample_update_context_total_tokens ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let updated:ManagedUpdate = update_context(state, config, "user", "hello", 12, 8)
  +return updated.state.usage.total_tokens
+end

+fn sample_update_context_first_role ()->String
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let updated:ManagedUpdate = update_context(state, config, "user", "hello", 12, 8)
  +let first:ConversationMessage = get(updated.state.messages, 0)
  +return first.role
+end

+fn sample_update_context_trim_tokens ()->Int
  +let state:ContextState = empty_state()
  +let config:ContextConfig = default_config()
  +let updated:ManagedUpdate = update_context(state, config, "user", "hello", 12, 8)
  +return updated.decision.trim_tokens
+end

+fn has_result_array (updates_json:String)->Bool

+fn safe_has_updates (updates_json:String)->Bool
  +if has_result_array(updates_json)
    +return has_updates(updates_json)
  +else
    +return false
+end

+fn safe_next_offset_from_updates (updates_json:String, current_offset:Int)->Int
  +if has_result_array(updates_json)
    +return next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, current_offset)
  +else
    +return current_offset
+end

+fn process_updates_response (updates_json:String)->Int [io,async]
  +if safe_has_updates(updates_json)
    +let first_update:String = extract_first_update_json(updates_json)
    +await sent:String = process_update(first_update)
    +let next_offset:Int = safe_next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, 0)
    +return next_offset
  +else
    +return 0
+end

+fn poll_once (offset:Int)->Int [io,async]
  +await updates_json:String = get_updates(offset)
  +if safe_has_updates(updates_json)
    +let first_update:String = extract_first_update_json(updates_json)
    +await sent:String = process_update(first_update)
    +let next_offset:Int = safe_next_offset_from_updates(updates_json, offset)
    +return next_offset
  +else
    +return offset
+end

!module ContextBudget
+fn message_to_json (msg:ConversationMessage)->String
  +let esc_role:String = json_escape(msg.role)
  +let esc_content:String = json_escape(msg.content)
  +let p1:String = "{\"role\":\""
  +let p2:String = concat(p1, esc_role)
  +let p3:String = concat(p2, "\",\"content\":\"")
  +let p4:String = concat(p3, esc_content)
  +return concat(p4, "\"}")
+end

+fn message_from_json_role (json:String)->String
  +return json_get(json, "role")
+end

+fn message_from_json_content (json:String)->String
  +return json_get(json, "content")
+end

+fn sample_message_to_json ()->String
  +let msg:ConversationMessage = {role: "user", content: "hello"}
  +return message_to_json(msg)
+end

+fn sample_message_from_json_role ()->String
  +let json:String = "{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":\"hi\"}"
  +return message_from_json_role(json)
+end

+fn sample_message_from_json_content ()->String
  +let json:String = "{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":\"hi\"}"
  +return message_from_json_content(json)
